headline: Popular Florida family theme park closes down for new development
summary: Popular theme parks have begun disappearing from the landscape, as developers anticipate huge returns from converting massive amusement park parcels of land into lucrative real estate projects. Cedar Fair sold its valuable California Great America property in the Silicon Valley to real estate ...

headline: The Strait Squeeze
summary: US stocks fell as Brent hit $112 and gold plunged, while the Fed signaled hikes despite the Iran war. Check out why inflation concerns have revived.

headline: Prologis And GIC Partner On US$1.6b Build To Suit Expansion
summary: Prologis (NYSE:PLD) and GIC have agreed to form a US$1.6b joint venture focused on build to suit logistics facilities in the U.S. The partnership is intended to fund and develop customized distribution and warehousing projects for specific tenant needs. The venture is positioned around demand for tailored logistics real estate tied to supply chain and e commerce requirements. For you as an investor, this joint venture reinforces what Prologis already focuses on: large scale logistics and...
